Instruct: Given a web search query, retrieve relevant passages that answer the query

notes: All compared models, including Qwen and Comsat, must be rerun with this exact pinned protocol.
Sionic did not publish its MTEB package commit, dataset revisions, or raw result JSON, so its card scores are reference-only until reproduced.
Current MTEB names the Korean Belebele subset kor_Hang-kor_Hang; the Sionic card calls it kor-kor, indicating a version/schema difference.
This suite is separate from official MTEB(kor, v1), which currently contains six tasks across classification, reranking, retrieval, and STS.
